accounts.title: Accounts

alias.title: Account Alias
alias.placeholder: Enter a nickname for this account

accounts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to remove this account?
accounts.deleteWarning: This will permanently remove the account and its stored tokens.
accounts.noValidExportData: No valid data found to export.
accounts.invalidFile: ❌ The selected file is invalid or corrupted.
accounts.noBackupData: ❌ The file does not contain valid backup data.

Are you sure you want to activate the account:
{{email}}?

notifications.depleted: 🔴 Credits depleted on {{email}}! Switching to next account...

auth.browserOpened: A browser window has been opened for sign-in.

refreshInterval.label: Refresh Interval
refreshInterval.description: How often to refresh balance data (in minutes)

lowCreditThreshold.label: Low Credit Threshold
lowCreditThreshold.description: Warn when credits drop below this amount

enableAutoSwitch.label: Smart Auto-Switch
enableAutoSwitch.description: Automatically switch to another account when credits are depleted

webview.sortExplanation: Accounts will be sorted by the balance of this model first.
webview.loginRequired: Sign in to an account to enable this option
webview.addFirstAccountDesc: Add your first account to start managing your credits with ease.

service.accountAddedErrorBalance: Account {{email}} added, but fetching balance failed. Will retry later.
service.missingLoginData: Login data for {{email}} is missing. Please remove and add it again.
service.sessionExpiredFailed: Session for {{email}} expired and failed to renew. Please re-authenticate.
service.refreshInProgress: ⏳ Balance refresh is already in progress...
service.refreshCooldown: ⏳ Please wait {{seconds}} seconds before refreshing again.
service.accountRemoved: Account {{email}} and all its data removed successfully.
service.switchFailed: Failed to switch to account {{email}}. Please check errors and try again.

stateDb.outdatedAntigravity:
Installed Antigravity version is older than {{minVersion}} and not supported.
Please update Antigravity to version {{minVersion}} or newer to use account switching.
stateDb.dbNotFound:
Antigravity database not found.
Make sure you have launched Antigravity and logged in at least once.
stateDb.injectionFailed:
Failed to inject data into database: {{error}}
Try closing all other Antigravity windows and try again.
stateDb.reloadPrompt: This window will close and Antigravity will be reopened with the new account.

oauth.authSuccessDetail: The account has been successfully linked to the Antigravity extension. You can close this window and return to the editor.
oauth.noPorts: No available ports to run local authentication server.

authService.noRefreshToken: Refresh Token not received. Please try again and accept all permissions.
authService.noEmail: Email not retrieved. Please check permissions.

extension.noAccountsToSwitch: No accounts registered. Please add an account first.
extension.selectAccountToSwitch: Select the account you want to switch to

switchPrompt.title: Successfully switched account to {{email}}
switchPrompt.detail: The editor needs to be reloaded to activate the new account. Would you like to reload now? (All open files will be automatically saved)
